title: DGQGSI introduction
code: ext <- system.file("extdata", package = "DGQGSI") pheno <- fread(file.path(ext, "example_pheno.csv")) gebv  <- fread(file.path(ext, "example_gebv.csv")) traits <- c("YLD","MY","MI","BL","NBL","VHB") dg <- c(YLD=1.5, MY=0.5, MI=0.5, BL=1, NBL=1, VHB=1)

title: DGQGSI introduction
code: res <- run_dgsi_qgsi_pipeline(   mode = "both",   init_data = pheno[, .(GenoID, Family)],   cand_data = pheno[, c("GenoID", traits), with = FALSE],   ref_data = pheno[, c("GenoID", traits), with = FALSE],   gebv_data = gebv,   trait_cols = traits,   dg = dg,   lower_is_better = c("BL", "NBL", "VHB"),   trait_min_sd = c(YLD=0.2, MY=0.1, MI=0.1, BL=0.1, NBL=0.1, VHB=0.1),   dg_scale_traits = FALSE,   qgsi_center_traits = FALSE,   qgsi_scale_traits = FALSE,   n_iter = 50,   n_rep = 3,   merge_outputs = TRUE,   debug = FALSE )  head(res$comparison_result$comparison_table) #>    GenoID DG_SelectionIndex DG_Selected LinearDGPart QuadraticDGPart  QGSI_DG #>    <char>             <num>      <lgcl>        <num>           <num>    <num> #> 1:   G013          9.095305        TRUE     3.043771       0.8199342 3.863705 #> 2:   G016          7.375457        TRUE     2.934136       0.7698778 3.704014 #> 3:   G029          7.332733        TRUE     3.245327       0.9101123 4.155439 #> 4:   G001          6.995980        TRUE     2.581310       0.4790381 3.060348 #> 5:   G007          6.072997        TRUE     1.752643       0.2413784 1.994021 #> 6:   G025          5.851942        TRUE     1.849823       1.1382887 2.988112 #>    Rank_QGSI_DG SignSame_DG_QGSI #>           <num>           <lgcl> #> 1:            2             TRUE #> 2:            3             TRUE #> 3:            1             TRUE #> 4:            4             TRUE #> 5:            7             TRUE #> 6:            5             TRUE

code: @Manual{,   title = {DGQGSI: Desired-Gain Selection Index and Desired-Gain QGSI Tools},   author = {Felicien Akohoue},   year = {2026},   note = {R package version 0.1.0},   url = {https://github.com/FAkohoue/DGQGSI}, }

title: DGQGSI
text: DGQGSI provides tools multi-trait selection breeding programs using desired-gain–based selection indices. package integrates two complementary approaches: Desired-Gain Selection Index Optimization (DGSI) Inspired Joukhadar et al. (2024), workflow estimates index weights produce realized genetic gains close breeder-defined desired gains. Desired-Gain Quadratic Genomic Selection Index (QGSI) Based Cerón-Rojas et al. (2026), nonlinear genomic index incorporates linear quadratic trait components model interactions among traits. methods allow breeders : define explicit desired genetic gains evaluate multi-trait genomic candidates incorporate trait interactions compare alternative selection indices package also includes: automatic construction quadratic desired-gain matrix W_d wrapper pipeline running one workflows comparison helper merge DGSI QGSI outputs genotype

title: DGQGSI
text: Modern crop breeding programs aim simultaneously improve multiple traits : yield stress tolerance disease resistance grain product quality Traditional selection indices typically rely economic weights, can difficult specify interpret breeding contexts. Breeders often prefer define desired genetic gains instead. DGQGSI provides tools : optimize selection indices using desired gains integrate genomic predictions incorporate trait interactions compare alternative selection strategies enables flexible biologically meaningful multi-trait selection.

title: DGQGSI
text: desired-gain selection index seeks weights b index: = b’X produces realized gains g match breeder’s desired gains d. algorithm implemented run_desired_gain_index_Joukhadar2024(): Samples candidate desired-gain vectors Computes index weights Evaluates realized genetic gains Minimizes deviation realized desired gains approach follows framework proposed : Joukhadar et al. (2024).

title: DGQGSI
text: QGSI extends classical linear indices incorporating nonlinear interactions among traits. index defined : QGSI_i = dᵀ γ_i + γ_iᵀ W_d γ_i : d = desired gain vector γ_i = vector trait GEBVs genotype W_d = quadratic interaction matrix quadratic component allows index capture: trait synergies trade-offs among traits nonlinear selection responses method described : Cerón-Rojas et al. (2026).

title: DGQGSI
text: DGQGSI pipeline integrates phenotype genomic predictions desired gain objectives.
code: Phenotypes / GEBVs         │         │         ▼ Desired Gain Vector (d)         │         ├───────────────┐         │               │         ▼               ▼ DGSI Optimization     QGSI Computation         │               │         ▼               ▼ Selection Index       QGSI Score         │               │         └───────┬───────┘                 ▼        Compare Genotype Rankings

title: DGQGSI
code: library(DGQGSI) library(data.table)  traits <- c("YLD", "MY", "MI", "BL", "NBL", "VHB")  dg <- c(   YLD = 1.5,   MY  = 0.5,   MI  = 0.5,   BL  = 1,   NBL = 1,   VHB = 1 )  ext <- system.file("extdata", package = "DGQGSI")  pheno <- fread(file.path(ext, "example_pheno.csv")) gebv  <- fread(file.path(ext, "example_gebv.csv"))  res <- run_dgsi_qgsi_pipeline(   mode = "both",   init_data = pheno[, .(GenoID, Family)],   cand_data = pheno[, c("GenoID", traits), with = FALSE],   ref_data = pheno[, c("GenoID", traits), with = FALSE],   gebv_data = gebv[, c("GenoID", traits), with = FALSE],   trait_cols = traits,   dg = dg,   lower_is_better = c("BL", "NBL", "VHB"),   trait_min_sd = c(     YLD = 0.2,     MY  = 0.1,     MI  = 0.1,     BL  = 0.1,     NBL = 0.1,     VHB = 0.1   ),   dg_scale_traits = FALSE,   qgsi_center_traits = FALSE,   qgsi_scale_traits = FALSE,   merge_outputs = TRUE,   debug = FALSE )  head(res$comparison_result$comparison_table)

title: DGQGSI
text: Joukhadar R, Li Y, Thistlethwaite R, Forrest KL, Tibbits JF, Trethowan R, Hayden MJ (2024). Optimising desired gain indices maximise selection response. Frontiers Plant Science 15:1337388.https://doi.org/10.3389/fpls.2024.1337388 Cerón-Rojas JJ, Montesinos-López OA, Montesinos-López , et al. (2026). Nonlinear genomic selection index accelerates multi-trait crop improvement. Nature Communications 17:1991.https://doi.org/10.1038/s41467-026-69890-3

title: DGQGSI: Desired-Gain Selection Index and Desired-Gain QGSI Tools — DGQGSI-package
text: Package providing tools : desired-gain selection index optimization, desired-gain adapted QGSI computation trait GEBVs, automatic construction quadratic desired-gain matrices, comparison DG QGSI outputs, high-level wrapper full pipeline execution.

title: Compare DG and QGSI outputs — compare_dg_and_qgsi
code: compare_dg_and_qgsi(dg_result, qgsi_result, id_col = "GenoID",   dg_cols = c(id_col, "SelectionIndex", "Selected"),   qgsi_cols = c(id_col, "LinearDGPart", "QuadraticDGPart", "QGSI_DG", "Rank_QGSI_DG"),   include_metadata = TRUE, compute_rank_differences = TRUE,   add_correlation_summary = TRUE, sort_by = c("DG_rank", "QGSI_rank", "DG", "QGSI", "none"),   debug = TRUE)

title: Compare DG and QGSI outputs — compare_dg_and_qgsi
text: dg_result Output run_desired_gain_index_Joukhadar2024(). qgsi_result Output run_qgsi_desired_gain(). id_col Identifier column. dg_cols Columns extract DG result. qgsi_cols Columns extract QGSI result. include_metadata Retained API consistency. compute_rank_differences Compute rank differences. add_correlation_summary Compute score/rank correlations. sort_by Final sort order. debug Print debug messages.

title: Run a full DG and QGSI pipeline — run_dgsi_qgsi_pipeline
code: run_dgsi_qgsi_pipeline(mode = c("both", "dg", "qgsi"), init_data,   trait_cols, dg, id_col = "GenoID", cand_data = NULL, ref_data = NULL,   G = NULL, select_mode = c("top_n", "trait_thresholds"),   n_select = 100, trait_min_sd = NULL, fallback_to_top_n = TRUE,   n_iter = 1000, n_rep = 20, sd_scale = 1, seed = 42,   ridge_P = 1e-06, ridge_M = 1e-06, dg_scale_traits = FALSE,   gebv_data = NULL, W_d = NULL, quadratic_diag_weights = NULL,   qgsi_center_traits = FALSE, qgsi_scale_traits = FALSE,   qgsi_impute_missing = TRUE, W_method = c("hybrid", "diag_only", "dg_outer", "corr_weighted"),   W_base_diag = NULL, W_lambda_diag = 1, W_lambda_outer = 0.5,   W_lambda_corr = 1, W_corr_power = 1, W_offdiag_shrink = 1,   W_positive_diagonal_only = TRUE, W_normalize = c("trace", "max_abs", "none"),   lower_is_better = NULL, merge_outputs = TRUE,   compare_sort_by = c("DG_rank", "QGSI_rank", "DG", "QGSI", "none"),   debug = TRUE)

title: Run a full DG and QGSI pipeline — run_dgsi_qgsi_pipeline
text: mode Run DG , QGSI , . init_data Metadata table. trait_cols Trait columns. dg Desired-gain vector. id_col Identifier column. cand_data Candidate trait table DG. ref_data Reference table DG. G Genetic covariance matrix DG. select_mode Selection mode DG. n_select Number selected top-n mode. trait_min_sd Thresholds DG. fallback_to_top_n Fallback behavior. n_iter DG iterations. n_rep DG replicates. sd_scale DG perturbation scale. seed Random seed. ridge_P DG ridge P. ridge_M DG ridge M. dg_scale_traits Scale DG inputs. gebv_data Trait GEBV table QGSI. W_d Optional quadratic matrix. quadratic_diag_weights Optional diagonal weights. qgsi_center_traits Center GEBVs. qgsi_scale_traits Scale GEBVs. qgsi_impute_missing Impute missing GEBVs. W_method Automatic W_d method. W_base_diag Optional base diagonal. W_lambda_diag Diagonal weight. W_lambda_outer Outer-product weight. W_lambda_corr Correlation-weighted component weight. W_corr_power Correlation exponent. W_offdiag_shrink -diagonal shrinkage. W_positive_diagonal_only Force non-negative diagonal. W_normalize Normalization method. lower_is_better Traits flip. merge_outputs Merge outputs mode . compare_sort_by Sort order merged output. debug Print debug messages.

W_d Quadratic matrix. quadratic_diag_weights Diagonal weights W_d NULL. lower_is_better Traits flip. center_traits Center GEBVs. scale_traits Scale GEBVs. impute_missing Impute missing GEBVs. return_components Return linear quadratic parts. debug Print debug messages.

title: DGQGSI 0.1.0
text: Initial package structure. Added desired-gain selection index workflow. Added desired-gain QGSI workflow. Added automatic W_d construction helper. Added comparison helper wrapper pipeline. Added pkgdown GitHub Actions configuration.
